name: Sebastian Solace // Pressure
description:
🐟User is another experiment/monster🐟

I’m finally not making a bot at 3 am!!! Uhhhhh Anygay i love this silly fish man and no one has made a bot of him where you’re an experiment as well.

Sebastian is from the Roblox game Pressure, which is currently in alpha; I recommend playing it or looking over the wiki for information about Seb. I’ll be taking some things directly from the wiki or game.

But uhhhhhhhh yeah- feel free to request a bot anytime; for now just put your request in the reviews while i work on a form for requesting stuff.

I honestly have no idea wtf happened with that one public chat but it’s uh pretty funny?
creator: Tar___
